title: The 5 REITs With the Longest Dividend Histories

title: Universal Health: Short-Term Challenges With A 4.8% Dividend Yield
text: UHT is undervalued, has a 20-year dividend raising history, and is currently yielding 4.8%.

title: Solid Sales Growth Makes These 5 Stocks Worth Buying Now
text: Robust sales growth is vital to gauge a company's ability to sustain its business. Let's check out Nexstar Media (NXST), Universal Health (UHS), salesforce.com (CRM), Grainger (GWW) and Marvell (MRVL), as these witness top-line growth.

title: UHS or THC: Which Stock is Better-Placed at the Moment?
text: Universal Health (UHS) and Tenet Healthcare (THC) are poised to grow in the promising hospital space. On comparative evaluation, we try to find out which one scores over the other.
